message:
feat(search-core): add vector index module for embedding-based message search

Add vector_index.rs implementing a vector similarity index for
semantic message search. Provides index construction from message
embeddings, approximate nearest-neighbor query support, and
configurable distance metrics (cosine, L2, dot product) — 261 lines
of new search infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
